entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A widely adapted energy crop used for biofuel production

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A model crop species used for synteny comparison with sorghum

entities.name: SWITCHGRASS
entities.description: A model crop species used for synteny comparison with sorghum

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A model crop species used for synteny comparison with sorghum

entities.name: FOXTAIL MILLET
entities.description: A model crop species used for synteny comparison with sorghum

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model organism used for synteny comparison with sorghum

entities.name: CELLULOSE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of cellulose in the cell wall, which affects biofuel production efficiency

entities.name: HEMICELLULOSE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of hemicellulose in the cell wall, which affects biofuel production efficiency

entities.name: LIGNIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of lignin in the cell wall, which affects biofuel production efficiency

entities.name: ETHANOL YIELD
entities.description: The amount of ethanol produced from crop biomass

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the time to reach 50% flowering

entities.name: FRESH BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The weight of fresh biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: DRY BIOMASS YIELD
entities.description: The weight of dry biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The duration or timing of the flowering process

entities.name: LODGING RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist falling over

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist pest attacks

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand non-living environmental stresses

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method to evaluate marker and phenotype associations among large diversity panels

entities.name: RNA SEQUENCING
entities.description: A technique used to analyze the transcriptome for gene expression

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to analyze differences between group means

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to obtain SNP data

entities.name: FARMCPU
entities.description: A software tool used to perform GWAS

entities.name: CIRCOS SOFTWARE
entities.description: A software used to represent synteny positions and genomic data

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Single base pair variations used as markers in GWAS

entities.name: LOCI
entities.description: Specific physical locations of a gene or marker on a chromosome

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes hypothesized to be responsible for a specific trait

entities.name: POST RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental timing during which the crop was evaluated

entities.name: BIOFUEL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing fuel from biological sources

entities.name: LIGNOCELLULOSIC BIOMASS
entities.description: Plant dry matter composed of cellulose, hemicellulose, and lignin

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: Gases that trap heat in the atmosphere, which biofuels aim to reduce

entities.name: CELL WALL COMPONENTS
entities.description: The structural elements of plant cells, including cellulose, hemicellulose, and lignin

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between the genetic makeup of an organism and its environment

entities.name: SYNTENY
entities.description: The physical co-localization of genetic loci on the same chromosome within an individual or species

entities.name: NCBI GEO DATABASE
entities.description: A public repository for gene expression data
